message:
Add first_ok and pipeline to combinator module exports

Adds module exports for:
- first_ok: Sequential fallback combinator (try operations until one succeeds)
- pipeline: Staged processing combinator (chain transformations)

Both combinators are now accessible via `asupersync::combinator::*`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
